creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Save this for your next ramen craving! 

📍Konjiki Hototogisu, Level 2, Mall of the Emirates. 
⭐️ A Michelin-star ramen restaurant from Tokyo

What we had:
🍜 Shoyu Ramen (69 AED): It’s the most unique ramen we’ve had by far. The soup has a complex of flavors that the staff advised us to taste on three different sides before mixing. It has clam tare, black truffle, porcini oil and chicken broth giving it a distinct delicious taste! 
🤎 We also had Chicken Karaage, Vegetable Fried Rice, Milk Tea. All worth trying! 

💸 Approximate bill for two: 150 to 200 AED.

Tag your ramen date!
